description: Promotional content for catering services that emphasizes variety, customization, and suitability for all occasions and events.
structural_recipe: Post high-quality images of catered dishes or event setups. Lead with occasion-agnostic language (para toda ocasión, for every event). Highlight diversity of offerings and customization capabilities. Include clear value proposition about making events special. Use call-to-action language around service availability. Showcase variety through multiple dish angles or spread displays.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers value personalized service and event excellence for social gatherings, which are culturally significant. Emphasizing variety and occasion-flexibility appeals to the broad spectrum of celebrations (weddings, corporate events, family gatherings) where catering plays a central role. The positioning of making events 'special' aligns with Saudi cultural emphasis on hospitality and memorable occasions.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure all food items shown comply with halal requirements and Islamic dietary guidelines
Avoid imagery with alcohol or non-halal ingredients
Gender-segregated event catering may require different marketing approaches
Respect prayer times when scheduling event-related content or promotions
cultural_constraints: Must showcase halal certification or compliance
Account for religious observances and seasonal variations
